testcase.name: test_gm_approve_re_project_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have some RE projects assert (0 > 0 or 5 == 0) + where 0 = len([]) + and 5 = len([{'advance_collected': 100000.0, 'building_type': 'residential', 'client_email': 'test1@example.com', 'client_name': 'Test Lead 1', ...}, {'advance_collected': 50000.0, 'building_type': '', 'client_email': 'testedit_73b3c7@test.com', 'client_name': 'Test Lead 3', ...}, {'advance_collected': 100000.0, 'building_type': '', 'client_email': 'Latha@gmail.com', 'client_name': 'Mrs. Latha', ...}, {'advance_collected': 700000.0, 'building_type': 'residential', 'client_email': 'Vinoth@drawlead.com', 'client_name': 'Mr.Vinoth ', ...}, {'building_type': 'villa', 'client_email': 'rajesh@example.com', 'client_name': 'Rajesh Kumar', 'client_phone': '9876543210', ...}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_re_approval_workflow.py:165: in test_gm_approve_re_project_endpoint assert len(approved_projects) > 0 or len(data) == 0, "Should have some RE projects" E AssertionError: Should have some RE projects E assert (0 > 0 or 5 == 0) E + where 0 = len([]) E + and 5 = len([{'advance_collected': 100000.0, 'building_type': 'residential', 'client_email': 'test1@example.com', 'client_name': 'Test Lead 1', ...}, {'advance_collected': 50000.0, 'building_type': '', 'client_email': 'testedit_73b3c7@test.com', 'client_name': 'Test Lead 3', ...}, {'advance_collected': 100000.0, 'building_type': '', 'client_email': 'Latha@gmail.com', 'client_name': 'Mrs. Latha', ...}, {'advance_collected': 700000.0, 'building_type': 'residential', 'client_email': 'Vinoth@drawlead.com', 'client_name': 'Mr.Vinoth ', ...}, {'building_type': 'villa', 'client_email': 'rajesh@example.com', 'client_name': 'Rajesh Kumar', 'client_phone': '9876543210', ...}])
